summary: Tested i18n language switching and design changes on /auctions page. All features working correctly: 'FÜR PROFIS!' badge removed and replaced with 'LIVE NOW'/'LIVE JETZT', friendly teal/emerald gradient design applied, and all translations switch correctly between German and English.

badge_removal.fur_profis_removed: PASS - 'FÜR PROFIS!' badge no longer exists on page
badge_removal.live_jetzt_german: PASS - Found 43 'LIVE JETZT' badges in German
badge_removal.live_now_english: PASS - Found 43 'LIVE NOW' badges in English

design_changes.teal_emerald_styling: PASS - Found 566 elements with teal/emerald gradient styling
design_changes.colorful_buttons: PASS - BID NOW buttons use emerald/teal/cyan gradients
design_changes.friendly_cards: PASS - Auction cards have rounded corners, shadows, hover effects

auction_cards.last_sold: PASS - Zuletzt versteigert für → Last sold for

language_switching.selector_visible: PASS - Language selector with globe icon visible in navbar
language_switching.german_to_english: PASS - Successfully switched from German to English
language_switching.translations_apply: PASS - All page elements update when language changes

critical_code_review_comments: i18n implementation is clean - uses useLanguage hook and t() function throughout
Fallback to German if translation key not found
20 languages supported with complete translations for auction page
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n fully working on /auctions page. Language selector in navbar allows switching between 20 languages. All auction card elements, categories, filters, and navbar items translate correctly. Design updated with friendly teal/emerald gradients. 'FÜR PROFIS!' badge replaced with 'LIVE NOW'/'LIVE JETZT'.
